metadata.og:description: A series of mixes intended for listening while programming.

metadata.og:description: The free and flexible app for your private thoughts.

metadata.og:title: Typora — simple yet powerful Markdown reader.
The Bullshit Web
metadata.og:description: My home computer in 1998 had a 56K modem connected to our telephone line; we were allowed a maximum of thirty minutes of computer usage a day, because my parents — quite reasonably — did not want to have their telephone shut off for an evening at a time. I remember webpages loading slowly: ten […]

metadata.og:title: Web Design Practices That Don't Suck
metadata.og:description: Practical web design principles that actually matter.

metadata.og:title: Failory: 90% of Startups Fail — Learn How Not To.
metadata.og:description: Learn from startup failures and successes in 5 min or less. The stories, frameworks, and tactics that will make you a 10x better founder.

metadata.og:title: First 1000 — Notes from a Duolingo PM building Lazyweb to 1,000 customers
metadata.og:description: Notes from a Duolingo PM using AI to design and grow Lazyweb.com to 1,000 paying customers. Join the First 1000 newsletter.

metadata.og:title: AlternativeTo – Crowdsourced software recommendations
metadata.og:description: Find alternatives to any software, app or service.

metadata.og:title: Squoosh
metadata.og:image:alt: A cartoon of a hand squeezing an image file on a dark background.
metadata.og:description: Squoosh is the ultimate image optimizer that allows you to compress and compare images with different codecs in your browser.

metadata.og:title: TinyPNG – Compress AVIF, WebP, PNG and JPEG images
metadata.og:description: Free online image optimizer for faster websites! Reduce the file size of your AVIF, WEBP, JPEG and PNG images while preserving the image quality.

metadata.og:title: Color Leap - History's Palettes
metadata.og:description: Search through 180 Color Palettes used throughout the last 4000 years.

metadata.og:title: Animagraffs - Animated infographics about everything.
metadata.og:description: Animated infographics about everything.

metadata.og:title: How a Car Works
metadata.og:description: Beautifully illustrated guides to car mechanics, automotive engineering and tools.

metadata.og:title: Light Pollution Map
metadata.og:description: Interactive world light pollution map. The map uses NASA Black marble VIIRS, Sky brightness, Aurora prediction, observatories, clouds and SQM/SQC overlay contributed by users.

metadata.og:title: SPACEX - ISS Docking Simulator
metadata.og:description: This simulator will familiarize you with the controls of the actual interface used by NASA Astronauts to manually pilot the SpaceX Dragon 2 vehicle to the International Space Station.

metadata.og:title: Share Secrets Securely
metadata.og:description: Share sensitive information securely with self-destructing links. Paste your secret, generate a link, and share it. Once viewed, it's gone forever

metadata.og:title: Astro
metadata.og:description: Astro builds fast content sites, powerful web applications, dynamic server APIs, and everything in-between.
metadata.og:image:alt: Astro - Build the web you want.

metadata.og:title: dbdiagram.io - Database Relationship Diagrams Design Tool
metadata.og:description: Quick and simple free tool to help you draw your database relationship diagrams and flow quickly using simple DSL language.
